landing.heroSubtitle: Your personal numerology map reveals who you truly are, your life path, and the energies that guide your destiny.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A complete numerology experience, from map generation to daily guidance for your choices.
landing.feature1Desc: Calculation of Destiny, Self, Soul, Personality, Quintessence and Life Cycles according to classic Pythagorean numerology.
landing.feature2Desc: Chat with an AI numerology consultant who knows your map and guides you daily.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate and download your map in PDF format with in-depth narrative reading.
landing.feature4Desc: Discover the energies of the current year and month to make conscious decisions.
landing.feature5Desc: Find the most auspicious dates for your goals: interviews, signings, new beginnings.
landing.feature6Desc: Receive personalized advice every morning on WhatsApp to start your day.
landing.feature7Desc: A guided 7-step journey to understand and integrate your numbers' energies into daily life.
landing.feature8Desc: Discover your numerological compatibility with your partner, friend, or colleague.
landing.feature9Desc: Personalized clothing suggestions based on the day's numerological energies.
landing.feature10Desc: Analyze the numerological vibration of your company or project name.
landing.feature11Desc: Discover the numerological energy of your address and how it influences your living space.
landing.numbersSubtitle: Each number carries a unique energy that influences your personality and your path.
landing.masterSubtitle: Elevated vibrations that require awareness and responsibility.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Your numerology map awaits. Start today on the journey toward self-awareness.
landing.ctaNote: Free registration • No credit card required
landing.pricingSubtitle: Three tiers to guide your numerological journey, from beginner to expert.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your path
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.invalidCredentialsDesc: Wrong email or password. Please try again.
auth.emailNotConfirmedDesc: Check your inbox and confirm your account.
auth.userExistsDesc: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
auth.registerSuccessDesc: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.photoNotice: 📸 After registration we'll ask for a close-up photo
auth.photoNoticeDesc: To offer you personalized outfit suggestions based on your physique, we'll need at least a face photo. You can also add full-body photos for even more precise advice!
auth.emailConfirmNotice: You will receive a confirmation email to activate your account.

onboarding.tellUsDesc: Your data is essential for calculating your numerology map
onboarding.photosDesc: The close-up photo is <1>required</1> to provide you with daily personalized outfit suggestions based on your physical appearance, complexion and build.
onboarding.photosTip: 💡 <1>Tip:</1> also upload full-body photos to get even more precise outfit suggestions based on your real body type.
onboarding.photosPrivacy: Photos are private and visible only to you. They will be used exclusively to generate tailored outfit suggestions.
onboarding.confirmDesc: Verify everything is correct before proceeding
onboarding.profileCompleteDesc: You can now generate your numerology map.

dashboard.personalYearDesc: This is your personal year. Discover what it holds and how to make the most of the year's energies.
dashboard.generateMapDesc: Calculate your numbers and generate the full report
dashboard.chatDesc: Talk to the AI numerology consultant
dashboard.advancedReportDesc: 20+ page AI analysis with manual review
dashboard.historyDesc: View and download your PDF reports
dashboard.favorableDatesDesc: Find the best dates for your goals
dashboard.compatibilityDesc: Compare your map with another person
dashboard.brandAnalyzerDesc: Test the numerological vibration of a name
dashboard.houseVibrationDesc: Analyze the energy of your space

profile.title: Profile
profile.requiredFieldsDesc: Please fill in all required fields.
profile.profileUpdatedDesc: Your data has been saved successfully.
profile.photosDesc: Update your photos for more precise outfit suggestions
profile.deletePhotoConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
profile.regenerateMapDesc: If you've modified your data, you can regenerate your numerology map to get updated calculations.
profile.disableAccountDesc: Your account will be disabled and you won't be able to sign in. Your data will be preserved and you can reactivate it by contacting support.
profile.disableConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable your account? You won't be able to sign in until reactivation.
profile.accountDisabledDesc: Your account has been disabled. Contact support to reactivate it.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.headline: Choose the perfect plan for you
pricing.subtitle: Unlock the full potential of your numerology map with the plan that best fits your needs.
pricing.freeTrialNote: 🎁 2 free accesses to try the service before choosing!
pricing.upgradeRequiredDesc: This feature requires the {{plan}} plan or higher.
pricing.freeTrialDesc: You still have free accesses available. Would you like to use one to try this feature?
